🤖 Poul's Killer Swarms
🚀 The Next Agentic CLI for .NET Developers
Version 6.5.0+7fbfc478857b3880c8231b17a2a31191770a0735
.NET Runtime 10.0.5
Type 'dotnet dnx pks-cli -- --help' to get started with your agentic development
journey!
┌─First-Time Usage Warning──────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                       │
│ ⚠️  IMPORTANT DISCLAIMER ⚠️                                             │
│                                                                       │
│ This CLI tool is powered by AI and generates code automatically.      │
│ The generated code has NOT been validated by humans.                  │
│                                                                       │
│ AI may make mistakes - use at your own risk.                          │
│                                                                       │
│ Please review all generated code before use and report any issues at: │
│ https://github.com/pksorensen/pks-cli                                 │
│                                                                       │
└───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
Do you acknowledge and accept these terms? [y/n] (n): USAGE:
pks [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

commands.name: init
commands.description:
-f, --force                                          Force overwrite
existing files
--nuget-source <SOURCE>                          Custom NuGet
source/feed to search
for templates
--local-template-path <PATH>                     Path to a local
template directory
(bypasses NuGet for
testing)
--tag <TAG>                     pks-templates    NuGet tag to filter
templates (default:
pks-templates)
--prerelease                                     Include
prerelease/preview
template packages
--agentic                                        Enable agentic features
and AI automation
--mcp                                            Enable Model Context
Protocol (MCP)
integration
--spawn-devcontainer                             Automatically spawn
devcontainer after
initialization
--no-devcontainer-prompt                         Skip the prompt to
spawn devcontainer
--volume-name <NAME>                             Custom volume name for
devcontainer
--no-launch-vscode                               Don't automatically
launch VS Code
--build-arg <ARG>                                Docker build argument
in KEY=VALUE format
(can be specified
multiple times)
--prompt-build-args                              Interactively prompt
for Docker build
arguments with defaults
from devcontainer.json
--build-log <PATH>                               Write devcontainer
build output to a log
file instead of console

options.name: --template
options.description:
Template short name to
use (e.g.,
pks-claude-dotnet9)

arguments.name: PROJECT_NAME
arguments.description: The name of the project to initialize

options.name: --ai-optimize
options.description: Use AI to optimize deployment strategy

commands.name: status
commands.description: View system status with real-time insights

options.name: --environment
options.description:
all        Environment to check (dev, staging,
prod, all)

commands.name: agent
commands.description: Manage AI agents for development automation

options.name: --action
options.description:
List          Action to perform (create, list, status,
start, stop, remove)

options.name: --type
options.description:
automation    Type of agent (automation, monitoring,
deployment, etc.)

options.name: --id
options.description:
Agent ID for status, start, stop, or remove
operations

commands.name: ascii
commands.description: Generate beautiful ASCII art for your projects

options.name: --style
options.description:
banner     ASCII art style (banner, block, digital,
starwars)

options.name: --color
options.description: cyan       Color for the ASCII art

arguments.name: TEXT
arguments.description: Text to convert to ASCII art

commands.name: report
commands.description: Create GitHub issues with system information and user

options.name: --include-telemetry
options.description:
True                  Include anonymous
telemetry data in the
report

options.name: --include-environment
options.description:
True                  Include environment and
system information

options.name: --include-version
options.description:
True                  Include PKS CLI version
information

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Preview the report
without creating the
GitHub issue

arguments.name: MESSAGE
arguments.description: The message or feedback to include in the report

commands.name: devcontainer
commands.description: Manage devcontainer configurations for isolated development

options.name: --output-path
options.description: Output directory path for devcontainer files

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Show what would be done without making changes

options.name: --features
options.description:
Comma-separated list of features to
include

options.name: --extensions
options.description:
Comma-separated list of VS Code
extensions to include

options.name: --ports
options.description:
Comma-separated list of ports to
forward

options.name: --post-create-command
options.description:
Command to run after container
creation

options.name: --docker-compose
options.description:
Use Docker Compose instead of single
container

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Run in interactive mode with prompts

commands.name: wizard
commands.description: Interactive wizard for comprehensive devcontainer setup

options.name: --expert-mode
options.description: Enable expert mode with advanced options

options.name: --quick-setup
options.description: Use quick setup with minimal prompts

options.name: --from-templates
options.description:
Discover and use templates from NuGet
packages

options.name: --sources
options.description:
Comma-separated list of NuGet sources to use
for template discovery

options.name: --add-sources
options.description:
Comma-separated list of additional NuGet
sources to include

options.name: --debug
options.description:
Enable debug output for troubleshooting
template discovery

arguments.name: CONFIG-PATH
arguments.description: Path to devcontainer.json file to validate

commands.description: Spawn a devcontainer in a Docker volume for development

options.name: --volume-name
options.description: Custom volume name for the devcontainer

options.name: --no-launch-vscode
options.description:
Don't automatically launch VS Code after
spawning

options.name: --no-bootstrap
options.description:
Use direct execution instead of bootstrap
container (advanced)

options.name: --forward-docker-config
options.description:
Forward Docker credentials from host to
devcontainer (default: true, matches VS
Code behavior)

options.name: --no-forward-docker-config
options.description:
Disable Docker credential forwarding (use
when you don't want host Docker
credentials in container)

options.name: --docker-config-path
options.description:
Path to Docker config.json to forward
(defaults to ~/.docker/config.json)

options.name: --rebuild
options.description:
Force rebuild even if no configuration
changes detected

options.name: --no-rebuild
options.description:
Skip rebuild even if configuration
changes detected

options.name: --auto-rebuild
options.description:
Automatically rebuild without prompting
when configuration changes detected

arguments.name: PROJECT_PATH
arguments.description: Path to project directory (defaults to current directory)

options.name: --format
options.description:
table      Output format: table or json (default:
table)

register
commands.description: Register a runner for an owner/project

options.name: --server
options.description:
Agentics server URL (falls back to AGENTIC_SERVER
env, then agentics.dk)

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start the runner daemon to poll for and execute

options.name: --inprocess
options.description:
Execute jobs in-process
instead of spawning
devcontainers (for testing)

options.name: --vibecast-binary
options.description:
Path to vibecast binary
(default: uses
VIBECAST_BINARY env or 'npx
vibecast')

options.name: --project
options.description:
Project to run for in
owner/project format.
Auto-registers if not already
registered. Without this,
uses first saved registration

options.name: --server
options.description:
Agentics server URL (falls
back to AGENTIC_SERVER env,
then agentics.dk). Used when
auto-registering with

options.name: --git-user-name
options.description:
Git user.name to configure
inside the devcontainer
(default: si-14x)

options.name: --git-user-email
options.description:
Git user.email to configure
inside the devcontainer
(default: si-14x@agentics.dk)

Enable verbose output with
detailed information

Output path for the

options.description:
standard    PRD template type
(standard,

web, api, minimal,
enterprise)

options.description:
Business context or
background for the
project

options.name: --force
options.description:
Overwrite existing

exists

options.description:
Interactive mode
for detailed PRD
generation
